text.message: He have 7 points and ur atilk asking for nb xd
Cause I need all the help I can get
Yeah also weird for you to nb highest points xd
Cause I get a useful card from it
You realize I'm not getting road or army
And the person who wins tends to have army or road
So idk why you guys are soloing me of all people when I'm last
Like, do you guys want to win or what?
Black can take road watch out
well people decided to block last place over first place so...
Yeah, I got use out of my nb
